name: Crunchy Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together flour and baking powder. Stir in almond flour.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, butter, vanilla, lemon zest, and lemon juice until smooth.
4. Gradually stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until a soft, sticky dough forms.
5. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface; knead once or twice. Form a ball.
6. Divide dough in half and shape each portion into a 12-inch log. Place logs on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Brush tops of the logs with egg white using a pastry brush.
8. Bake for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown on top.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack for 5 minutes.
10. Cut cooled biscotti into 3/4-inch diagonal slices using a sharp chef's knife in firm, decisive strokes.
11. Return the sliced biscotti to the baking sheet and arrange upright. Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crisp.
12. Allow biscotti to cool completely on wire rack before storing in an airtight container.
